title: Handoff skill — cross-CLI / cross-machine session transfer

_label_history.note: During spec drafting, chat-time NFR labels were renumbered to sequential order in §7. Mapping preserved here for chat-history-to-spec reconciliation. Spec body uses the sequential labels exclusively.
mappings: chat OPS-4 (exit codes are public contract) -> spec OPS-3
chat SEC-4 (per-branch payload ceiling) -> spec SEC-4 (no shift)
OPS-2 (bootstrap idempotent) was folded into REL-3, freeing the OPS-2 number
